name: Q1543169
abstract: Campbell Aurelius "Skeets" Tolbert (February 14, 1909, in Calhoun Falls, South Carolina – November 30, 2000, in Houston, Texas) was an American jazz clarinetist, alto saxophonist, vocalist, composer and bandleader. He acquired the nickname "Skeets", which was short for "Mosquito." Tolbert grew up in Lincolntown, North Carolina, and studi…
